query:
SELECT 
  id,
  userId,
  LENGTH(tastytradeRefreshToken) as token_length,
  SUBSTR(tastytradeRefreshToken, 1, 150) as token_start,
  CASE 
    WHEN tastytradeRefreshToken LIKE '%"scope":"read trade openid"%' THEN 'HAS ALL SCOPES'
    ELSE 'CHECK SCOPES'
  END as scope_status
FROM apiCredentials 
WHERE userId = 1;
